author: raoatifshad
body:
#### PR description:
This PR fixes a clang static analyzer warning in
CondCore/CondHDF5ESSource/plugins/HDF5ProductResolver.cc.

The previous implementation reused the variable `size`
for both the zstd frame content size and the decompressed
payload size. In the `ZSTD_CONTENTSIZE_UNKNOWN` case,
`size` was assigned `iMemSize` but the value was never read
before being overwritten by `ZSTD_decompress()`, triggering
a `deadcode.DeadStores` warning.

This change introduces separate variables,
`frameContentSize` and `decompressedSize`,
which removes the dead store and improves readability
without changing the existing behavior.
### Warning:
```
src/CondCore/CondHDF5ESSource/plugins/HDF5ProductResolver.cc:224:7:
warning: Value stored to 'size' is never read [deadcode.DeadStores]
```
title: [WarningFix]:CondCore/CondHDF5ESSource- avoids dead store in zstd dec
